info.brief: Functions and constants for doing in-app purchases. Supported on iOS, Android (Google Play and Amazon) and Facebook Canvas platforms. [icon:ios] [icon:googleplay] [icon:amazon] [icon:facebook]
info.description: Functions and constants for doing in-app purchases. Supported on iOS, Android (Google Play and Amazon) and Facebook Canvas platforms. [icon:ios] [icon:googleplay] [icon:amazon] [icon:facebook]

parameters.name: options
parameters.doc: optional parameters as properties. The following parameters can be set

elements.name: iap.finish
elements.description: Explicitly finish a product transaction. [icon:attention] Calling iap.finish is required on a successful transaction if `auto_finish_transactions` is disabled in project settings. Calling this function with `auto_finish_transactions` set will be ignored and a warning is printed. The `transaction.state` field must equal `iap.TRANS_STATE_PURCHASED`.

parameters.name: transaction
parameters.doc: transaction table parameter as supplied in listener callback

elements.name: iap.acknowledge
elements.description: Acknowledge a transaction. [icon:attention] Calling iap.acknowledge is required on a successful transaction on Google Play unless iap.finish is called. The transaction.state field must equal iap.TRANS_STATE_PURCHASED.

parameters.name: transaction
parameters.doc: transaction table parameter as supplied in listener callback

elements.name: iap.list
elements.description: Get a list of all avaliable iap products.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.doc: table (array) of identifiers to get products from

parameters.name: callback
parameters.doc: result callback taking the following parameters

returnvalues.name: success
returnvalues.doc: value is `true` if current store supports handling restored transactions, otherwise `false`.

elements.name: iap.set_listener
elements.description: Set the callback function to receive purchase transaction events.

parameters.name: listener
parameters.doc: listener callback function. Pass an empty function if you no longer wish to receive callbacks.
